name: mcp-wireshark
description: [Unofficial/Community] MCP server for Wireshark/tshark integration - capture live network traffic, parse pcap files, apply display filters, and analyze network protocols with AI assistance
author: Khang Nguyen Huynh

requirements.name: Wireshark/tshark
requirements.description: Wireshark network analyzer with tshark CLI tool

tools.name: check_installation
tools.description: Check if Wireshark/tshark is installed and return version info

tools.name: list_interfaces
tools.description: List all available network interfaces for packet capture

tools.name: read_pcap
tools.description: Read and analyze packets from .pcap or .pcapng files

tools.name: display_filter
tools.description: Apply Wireshark display filters to packet data

tools.name: summarize_pcap
tools.description: Get a high-level summary of a pcap file: packet count, duration, top protocols, top talkers

tools.name: stats_by_proto
tools.description: Generate protocol statistics from capture files

tools.name: follow_tcp
tools.description: Follow TCP streams and extract payload data

tools.name: follow_udp
tools.description: Follow UDP streams and extract payload data

tools.name: expert_info
tools.description: tshark expert analysis: warnings, errors, and notes grouped by severity

tools.name: decode_protocol
tools.description: Extract protocol fields as a TSV table with curated defaults for HTTP, DNS, TLS, GOOSE, MMS, SV, SIP, ICMP

tools.name: protocol_stats
tools.description: Aggregate tshark -z reports: protocol hierarchy, conversations, endpoints, HTTP/DNS/SMB stats

tools.name: analyze_iec61850
tools.description: Analyze GOOSE/SV/MMS captures for health anomalies; returns a worst-first OK/WARN/FAIL report per source

tools.name: live_capture
tools.description: Capture live network traffic from a specified interface

tools.name: export_json
tools.description: Export packets to JSON format for further analysis

examples.prompt: List all network interfaces available for capture
Capture HTTP traffic on eth0 for 30 seconds
Analyze the pcap file and show DNS queries
Check substation.pcap for GOOSE health problems
